headlines.title: Buildings collapse in Venezuelan capital after powerful earthquakes hit
headlines.snippet: Several buildings have collapsed in Venezuela's capital following a series of powerful earthquakes. The extent of the damage and potential casualties are still being assessed.

headlines.title: Two years on, Kenyan families still seek justice after Gen Z protests
headlines.snippet: Two years after widespread youth-led protests, Kenyan families are still seeking justice for those killed and missing. Investigations into the events have reportedly stalled, leaving accountability elusive.

headlines.title: Venezuela struck by back-to-back earthquakes, many casualties feared
headlines.snippet: Venezuela has been struck by powerful back-to-back earthquakes, raising fears of significant casualties. The US Geological Survey has indicated that high casualty numbers are probable.

headlines.title: Iran war live: US vows to defend Gulf interests; Israel kills 2 in Lebanon
headlines.snippet: The US has pledged to defend Gulf interests amid ongoing conflict. Meanwhile, Israel reports it has killed two individuals in southern Lebanon.

headlines.title: Trump slams NATO over lax participation in Iran war in talk with Mark Rutte
headlines.snippet: Mark Rutte highlighted the use of US bases in Europe as he discussed support for the US war on Iran with Trump. Trump also spoke about NATO's participation.

headlines.title: Trump criticises European allies over lack of support during war on Iran
headlines.snippet: Trump has criticized European allies for their perceived lack of support during the US-Israeli war on Iran. He stated that while US assistance was not needed, stronger backing would have been welcomed.

headlines.title: Trump casts doubt on US responsibility for deadly Iran school strike
headlines.snippet: Trump expressed doubt regarding US responsibility for a deadly Iranian school strike, citing a lack of evidence. A Pentagon investigation into the incident is ongoing.

headlines.title: Vance says US reviewing conditions for Türkiye's F-35 purchase
headlines.snippet: Vance announced that the US is reviewing the conditions for Türkiye's F-35 fighter jet purchase. The process involves certifying that Türkiye has met legal requirements, with Congress playing a role.

headlines.title: UN nuclear chief says inspections in Iran will go ahead despite Tehran's caution
headlines.snippet: The head of the IAEA stated that UN nuclear inspectors will proceed with inspections in Iran, despite Tehran's indications that this would only happen after a final agreement. These inspections are part of an interim agreement.

headlines.title: Israeli army says it struck two people in southern Lebanon
headlines.snippet: The Israeli army reported striking two individuals in an area it occupies in southern Lebanon. The army claimed the individuals posed a threat while travelling in a vehicle.

headlines.title: Al Arabiya correspondent Mohammed Aydah killed in explosion in Yemen’s Mukalla
headlines.snippet: Al Arabiya correspondent Mohammed Aydah has been killed in an explosion that occurred in Mukalla, Yemen.

headlines.title: Federal judge bars Trump from implementing proof of citizenship requirement to vote
headlines.snippet: A federal judge has issued an order preventing Trump from implementing a requirement for proof of citizenship for voting.

headlines.title: Italy slams NATO chief’s comments on Iran war flights
headlines.snippet: Italy has criticized remarks made by NATO chief Mark Rutte concerning flights related to the Iran war.

headlines.title: Russian strike on Ukraine kills mine disposal expert: NGO

headlines.title: Erdogan says bilateral talks with Trump likely at NATO summit in Turkey
headlines.snippet: Erdogan indicated that bilateral talks with Trump are likely to occur at an upcoming NATO summit in Turkey.

headlines.title: Trump seeks $88 bn in extra funding, mostly for Iran war
headlines.snippet: The White House has requested over $87 billion in additional funding, a significant portion of which is designated for the Iran war.

headlines.title: Colombia president-elect to work with Israel 'like never before'
headlines.snippet: The president-elect of Colombia has expressed intentions to work with Israel in an unprecedented manner. This follows a period of strained relations under the previous leftist government.

headlines.title: UK government's answer to stolen Palestinian land? Ad watchdog
headlines.snippet: Regarding stolen Palestinian land, the UK government's response involves an advertising watchdog. This action highlights the perceived weakness of recent UK government sanctions concerning Israeli settlement homes.

headlines.title: Syria trial opens for Assad cousin accused of war crimes
headlines.snippet: A trial has commenced in Syria for an individual accused of war crimes, identified as a cousin of Assad. The court is examining alleged crimes against humanity and war crimes.

headlines.title: US to progress with Turkey jet engine sales ahead of NATO summit
headlines.snippet: The United States is moving forward with plans for jet engine sales to Turkey, prior to the NATO summit. Relations between the US and Turkey have generally been positive.
